prompt: Add initials(profile), returning the uppercase first character of each non-blank first and last name with no separator. Add tests for two, one, and zero name parts, then run them.

argv: import sys; sys.path.insert(0, 'src'); from profiles import initials; assert initials({'first_name':' ada ', 'last_name':'lovelace'}) == 'AL'; assert initials({'last_name':'hopper'}) == 'H'; assert initials({}) == ''
